payload.answer: Compiled durable memories for Sam: employment change to Point72, continuing Bill Evans interest with increased early Coltrane listening, and planned AI infrastructure catch-up with Daniele.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

memory_cards.statement: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam still listens to Bill Evans and has lately been listening more to early Coltrane.
Sam and Daniele intend to catch up about AI infrastructure; Sam asked Daniele to send an article about it.

details: Committed current employment as Point72 and former employment as Goldman, preserving the temporal qualifier 'last month'.
Committed music preferences with recency qualifier for early Coltrane.
Committed planned discussion topic and article request as medium-confidence future/contextual memory.
